calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-09-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for request for default judgment against Defendant Brandon Yan.
Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:17:38 a.m. and concluding at 9:24:26 a.m. (D505)

Plaintiff Jenny Qun Tan appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.
Defendant Brandon Yan not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for Contract/Warranty filed August 31, 2022.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Brandon Yan on November 16, 2022.
Default entered as to Defendant Brandon Yan on March 17, 2023.
Dismissal filed as to Defendant Yvonne Feng Yi Liu on May 1, 2024.

Court addresses Plaintiff.
Plaintiff informs the Court, she is requesting a judgment against Defendant Brandon Yan. Plaintiff to recite on the record the amounts sought.
Plaintiff to confirm to the Court that the declaration made is true and correct.

After reviewing the declaration and hearing the testimony, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has met their prima facie case.

The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant the following:
Damages $50,000.00
Interest $11,506.72
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $693.90
Total Judgment $62,200.62

Proposed Judgment modified to the Court's order.

Signed and executed by the Court this day.

Notice Of Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-29-2024 Continued To May-03-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a request for default judgment against Defendant Brandon Yan and Defendant Yvonne Feng Yi.

Dept.505: Judge: Cecillia Castellanos; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:37:22 a.m. and concluding at 11:19:42 a.m. (D505)

Plaintiff Jenny Qun Tan appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.
Defendant Brandon Yan not appearing.
Defendant Yvonne Feng Yi not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract filed Oct-31-2022
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Brandon Yan and Defendant Yvonne Feng Yi served Nov-16-2022.
Default entered as to Defendant Brandon Yan and Defendant Yvonne Feng Yi on March 15, 2023.
Notice of motion for prove-up hearing filed on Feb-20-2024.

The Court reviewed the moving papers submitted by the Plaintiff very carefully. The Court summarizes the content of the Complaint.
The Court is unable to grant 2 separate judgments for 2 different defendants in one action.
The Court encourages the Plaintiff to seek legal advice as to the many issues found within the case.
The Court refers the plaintiff to the Clerk's office for some flyers available regarding attorney service.

The Court continues the matter to May 3, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 505. Plaintiff is to cure issues and to provide notice of the new hearing date.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2024 Continued To Jun-04-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
